vocabulary.example_sentence: Biology is my favourite subject this term.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 生物学是我这学期最喜欢的科目。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We learn IT in a smart computer room.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们在智能机房里学信息技术。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Geography helps us remember countries on the map.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 地理课帮助我们记住地图上的国家。

vocabulary.example_sentence: History class is exciting and useful.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 历史课既激动人心又实用。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Some students think maths is boring.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 有些学生觉得数学很乏味。

vocabulary.example_sentence: French is useful when you travel in the future.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 将来旅行时法语很有用。

vocabulary.chinese: 令人激动的；使人兴奋的
vocabulary.example_sentence: The music class sounds exciting this term.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这学期的音乐课听起来很令人兴奋。

vocabulary.chinese: 过去；过去的事情；过去的；在……之后
vocabulary.example_sentence: In the past, I was not good at numbers.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 过去我不擅长数字。

vocabulary.example_sentence: She is good with her hands and loves art.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她手很巧，喜欢美术。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Can you remember this number in class?
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 你能记住课上的这个数字吗？

vocabulary.example_sentence: I help my friend with biology homework.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我帮朋友做生物作业。

vocabulary.example_sentence: What is the reason you like history?
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 你喜欢历史的原因是什么？

vocabulary.example_sentence: We listen to the teacher in every class.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们在每节课上都听老师讲课。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Tom is good at IT and maths.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 汤姆擅长信息技术和数学。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Remember to bring your instrument tomorrow.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 记得明天带上你的乐器。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Work hard in class, as exams come at the end of the term.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 努力学习，因为学期末有考试。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Biology class starts at 8 AM.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 生物课上午八点开始。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We have geography at 2 PM on Friday.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们周五下午两点上地理课。

vocabulary.chinese: 法语；法国的；法国人的；法语的
vocabulary.example_sentence: French sounds excellent when she sings.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她唱歌时法语听起来棒极了。

vocabulary.example_sentence: You did an excellent job in music class.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 你在音乐课上表现优秀。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The singer plays an instrument in the band.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 那位歌手在乐队里演奏乐器。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The singer has an excellent voice.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这位歌手嗓音极好。

vocabulary.example_sentence: In the future, I want to study IT.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 将来我想学习信息技术。

vocabulary.example_sentence: In the future, robots may help us work out problems.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 将来机器人也许能帮我们解决问题。

vocabulary.example_sentence: This term we have five new subjects.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这学期我们有五门新科目。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Can you work out this maths problem?
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 你能解出这道数学题吗？

vocabulary.example_sentence: Ask the teacher if you have a problem in class.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 如果在课堂上有困难，就问老师。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Remember to listen to the teacher in class.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 记得在课堂上听老师讲课。

vocabulary.chinese: 魔法；魔力；魔术；有魔力的；有神奇力量的
vocabulary.example_sentence: Science feels like magic when experiments work.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 实验成功时，科学就像魔法一样。

vocabulary.example_sentence: School life is exciting and full of change.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 校园生活令人兴奋，充满变化。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Mike wants to be a scientist like Davis from Canada.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 迈克想像来自加拿大的戴维斯一样当科学家。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Baker is a scientist in our science club.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 贝克是我们科学俱乐部里的一名科学家。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Mike joins the drama club this term.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 迈克这学期加入了戏剧社。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Davis and Mike are interested in biology.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 戴维斯和迈克对生物学感兴趣。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Canada is a country with amazing wildlife.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 加拿大是一个拥有丰富野生动物的国家。
